print("Script Updated Automatically by Chromeee Hub")

local function E(E)return g[E-(324863-276645)]end do local E=string.sub local U=math.floor local Z=g local return(function(g,Z,e,H,c,A,R,b,Y,s,u,n,l,P,i,z,U,f,r,o,O,j)j,b,f,r,i,s,Y,u,O,l,U,z,n,o,P=469106+-469106,function(g,E)local Z=r(E)local e=function(e,H,c,A,R)return U(g,{e,H;c;A,R},E,Z)end return e return e end,function(g,E)local Z=r(E)local e=function(e)return U(g,{e},E,Z)end return e end,function()j=j+(917032+-917031)o[j]=-409210+409211 return j end,function(g)local end,{},{},function(g,E)local Z=r(E)local e=function(e,H)return U(g,{e;H},E,Z)end return e end return(l(3086247-(-79381),{}))(Z(R))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[E(-299396+347685)],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
